title: leontodon oxylepis var. divaricatus
intro: Leontodon oxylepis var. divaricatus, also known as the narrow-leaved hawk's beard or leontodon, is a plant species within the dandelion family, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to aid digestion and relieve gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of leontodon oxylepis var. divaricatus include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may contribute to its use in treating various health conditions. Leontodon oxylepis var. divaricatus can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, typically made by steeping the leaves in hot water, to utilize its medicinal properties.
